mapper.select: SELECT cp.customer_code FROM customer_profile cp INNER JOIN customer_order co ON co.customer_id = cp.id WHERE cp.customer_code LIKE CONCAT(#{poolPrefix}, '%') AND cp.customer_code >= CONCAT(#{poolPrefix}, #{poolStart}) AND cp.customer_code <= CONCAT(#{poolPrefix}, #{poolEnd}) AND co.status = 1 ORDER BY cp.customer_code ASC
